risk_name: Ransomware Attack on Core Banking Systems
description: Threat actors deploy ransomware targeting core banking infrastructure, causing prolonged outages and potential data exfiltration.

risk_name: Third-Party API Breach via Vendor Integration
description: A compromised third-party fintech API exposes customer account data and enables unauthorized fund transfers.
Generative AI enables hyper-personalised phishing campaigns targeting employees and customers, increasing credential theft.
Revised Basel IV output floors require higher risk-weighted assets, potentially constraining lending capacity and ROE.
Rapidly evolving global crypto/digital-asset regulations create compliance gaps and potential enforcement actions.
New CFPB rulemaking on overdraft fees and credit card late charges reduces fee income and requires product redesign.

risk_name: Physical Climate Risk in Mortgage Portfolio
description: Increased frequency of floods and wildfires impairs collateral values and drives mortgage defaults in exposed geographies.

risk_name: Transition Risk from Carbon Pricing Legislation
description: Carbon tax legislation impairs the credit quality of carbon-intensive borrowers and strands assets in the loan book.
Regulators increase scrutiny of ESG fund labelling; misleading disclosures expose the firm to fines and reputational damage.
Escalating tariffs and export controls disrupt global supply chains, compress corporate margins, and increase credit losses.

risk_name: Sanctions Evasion and Correspondent Banking Risk
description: State-sponsored actors exploit shell companies to evade sanctions; exposure risks severe regulatory penalties.

risk_name: Middle East Conflict Spillover on Energy Markets
description: Regional conflict causes oil price spikes that accelerate inflation, pressure central bank policy, and squeeze margins.

risk_name: Algorithmic Model Bias in Credit Decisioning
description: ML credit models exhibit disparate impact on protected classes, triggering fair-lending enforcement and class-action litigation.
Legacy core-banking migration faces cost overruns and delays, increasing operational risk and diverting strategic investment.
Advances in quantum computing threaten RSA/ECC encryption used to protect transactions and customer data.
Persistent remote-work trends depress office valuations, generating mark-to-market losses and covenant breaches in CRE loan portfolio.

risk_name: Interest Rate Volatility and NIM Compression
description: Unexpected rate cuts compress net interest margins faster than liability repricing, pressuring earnings guidance.
Social-media-amplified bank-run dynamics cause rapid deposit outflows, straining liquidity coverage ratios.
Over-reliance on a single hyperscaler cloud provider means a major outage halts payments, trading, and customer access.

risk_name: Talent Attrition in Risk and Compliance Functions
description: High turnover among risk, compliance, and audit professionals creates knowledge gaps and weakens the control environment.

risk_name: Payment Processing Fraud via Synthetic Identities
description: Fraudsters use AI to create synthetic identities that pass KYC checks, enabling large-scale first-party fraud losses.
Prolonged stagflation erodes real household incomes, driving elevated credit-card and personal-loan delinquency rates.
Rising defaults among highly leveraged borrowers generate mark-to-market losses and increased provision charges.

risk_name: Sovereign Debt Contagion in Emerging Markets
description: Debt restructurings in key EM economies trigger contagion, causing credit spread widening and write-downs in EM exposure.
Insolvency of a key payment-rail technology vendor disrupts domestic transaction processing for retail and corporate clients.

risk_name: Data Localisation Laws Impacting Cloud Strategy
description: New data-residency requirements in multiple jurisdictions force costly infrastructure changes and limit cloud provider choice.
High-yield fintech savings products accelerate deposit migration from incumbent banks, raising funding costs and reducing the core deposit franchise.

risk_name: Generative AI Adoption without Governance Framework
description: Rapid internal deployment of GenAI tools outpaces governance, creating model-risk, IP, and data-privacy exposures.
Complex structured notes are sold to retail investors without adequate suitability assessment, risking FCA enforcement and class-action redress.

risk_name: Insider Threat and Data Theft by Departing Staff
description: Departing employees exfiltrate sensitive client data or intellectual property, leading to regulatory investigations and litigation.
